MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Thomas Drohan, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: Clara Castillo. no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Clara Garces' Motion For Reconsideration or, in the alternative, Motion To Vacate Order is granted. Defendant's Claim of Exemption is granted. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
